name: 8q24_MYC_paralog_blocks
description: 8q24.21 region around MYC. The MYC locus itself is unique but the surrounding 8q24 gene desert hosts numerous enhancer elements and is the most-amplified region in solid cancers (ecDNA, double-minutes). 8q24 also contains PVT1 with extensive intra-locus duplications and fusion partners.

architecture.internal_structure: MYC and PVT1 single-copy in germline; ecDNA amplicons of 1-3 Mb create copy-number gains in colorectal, prostate, ovarian, breast, neuroblastoma (MYCN-low/MYC-driven) cancers.
